pr_text:
## Title: Add empty_value parameter to throughput logger for 3GPP compliance

### Summary
The throughput logger was missing a configurable empty value parameter, which is conditionally mandatory per 3GPP specifications for certain measurement reporting scenarios. The logger previously hardcoded zero when resetting buffer slots during tick events, but specifications require the ability to distinguish between "no data" and "zero throughput" conditions. This patch adds an `empty_value` parameter to
